data.title: Lusha's New Features: Elevate Your B2B Sales Strategy
data.excerpt: Explore Lusha's latest updates for verified emails and phone numbers from LinkedIn. Try it free and transform your outreach today!

$media.alt: Lusha's New Features: Elevate Your B2B Sales Strategy

children.text: If you're in sales or marketing, you know the drill: finding accurate contact information for decision-makers can feel like searching for a needle in a haystack. That's where Lusha comes in, and I'm thrilled to dive into its new features that are making waves in the B2B world. This platform isn't just another tool—it's a game-changer for anyone serious about growing their business through smarter outreach.
As an enthusiast who's seen Lusha evolve, I can tell you it's built to save you time and boost your results. Let's explore what's fresh and why you should pay attention.
What is Lusha?

Lusha is a B2B data platform that lets you find verified emails and phone numbers directly from LinkedIn profiles using a simple browser extension. It's designed to integrate seamlessly into your workflow, whether you're using a CRM, outreach tools, or just browsing LinkedIn. With a focus on accuracy, Lusha helps you connect with the right people without the guesswork. If you're curious about the basics, check out
our detailed guide on what is Lusha
I love how it simplifies prospecting—no more manual digging or outdated data. Lusha pulls from reliable sources and verifies information in real-time, so you can trust what you're getting.
New and Highlighted Features
Lusha has rolled out some exciting updates that take its capabilities to the next level. Here are the standout features that caught my eye:
AI Assistant

: This is a big one. The AI assistant helps you craft personalized outreach messages based on the contact data you find. It's like having a brainstorming partner that suggests relevant talking points, saving you hours of drafting emails.
Buying Intent Topics

: Now available in higher-tier plans, this feature signals when prospects are actively researching solutions like yours. Imagine knowing exactly when a lead is in the market—Lusha flags these opportunities so you can strike while the iron is hot.
Advanced Filters and Lookalikes

: The Starter plan and above include contact and company lookalikes, letting you find similar profiles to your best customers. Combined with advanced filters, you can narrow down searches by industry, company size, and more, ensuring you target the right audience.
Automated Email Sequences and Call Recordings

: Lusha isn't just about data; it's about action. With automated sequences, you can set up drip campaigns directly from the platform, and call recordings with AI insights help you analyze conversations for better follow-ups.
Bulk Enrichment and CSV Support
: For teams handling large datasets, the Pro plan offers CSV enrichment and webhooks, making it easy to update your existing lists with verified information.
These features aren't just incremental—they're transformative. The AI assistant alone has helped me refine my outreach strategy, leading to higher response rates. If you're ready to experience this,
try Lusha for free
and see the difference it makes.
Who Is Lusha Ideal For?
Lusha isn't a one-size-fits-all tool, but it shines for specific groups. Based on my experience, here's who will benefit most:
Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) and Account Executives
: If you're prospecting daily, Lusha cuts through the noise with verified contacts. I've seen SDRs double their meeting bookings by using accurate phone numbers.
Marketing Teams
: For lead generation and campaign targeting, Lusha's data helps build precise lists. The buying intent feature is gold for identifying warm leads.
Recruiters and HR Professionals
: Finding top talent often means reaching out directly. Lusha's extension makes it easy to get contact details for potential candidates on LinkedIn.
Small to Mid-Sized Businesses
: With flexible pricing, even startups can access enterprise-level data. The free tier is perfect for testing the waters.
No matter your role, if connecting with B2B decision-makers is part of your job, Lusha is worth a look. It's especially ideal for teams that value efficiency and accuracy—why waste time on bad data?
Pricing Plans That Scale with You

One thing I appreciate about Lusha is its transparent pricing. There's a permanent free plan with 40 credits per month, which is great for individuals or those just starting. Paid plans kick off with Starter at $44.95/month (billed yearly) for 6,000 credits annually, perfect for solopreneurs.

The Pro plan at $67.45/month (billed yearly) offers 9,600 credits and includes features like API access and CSV enrichment—ideal for growing teams. For larger operations, the Premium plan at $299.95/month (billed yearly) gives 40,800 credits and multiple seats, making it a powerhouse for scaling outreach. All plans include verified emails and phones, with higher tiers adding advanced tools. I recommend starting with the free plan to get a feel for it; you can always upgrade as your needs evolve.
How to Get Started with Lusha

Getting up and running with Lusha is straightforward. First, sign up for a free account—no credit card required. Install the Chrome extension, and when you visit a LinkedIn profile, Lusha's icon will appear, letting you pull contact details with a click. For a step-by-step walkthrough, refer to
our how-to-use-Lusha tutorial

I suggest starting by enriching a few existing contacts in your CRM to see the accuracy. The interface is intuitive, and within minutes, you'll be finding verified emails and phone numbers without hassle. Don't forget to explore the AI assistant for message ideas—it's a subtle but powerful helper.
Why Lusha Stands Out in a Crowded Market

In a world full of data providers, Lusha stands out for its focus on ease-of-use and verification. I've tried other tools, but Lusha's LinkedIn integration feels seamless, almost like a natural part of the platform. The data accuracy is top-notch; I've personally seen bounce rates drop significantly after switching. Plus, features like buying intent and AI insights add layers of intelligence that competitors often lack. For a deeper dive into why it's a smart choice, read
our take on why choose Lusha
It's not just about having data—it's about having the right data at the right time. Lusha delivers on that promise consistently.
Real-World Use Cases
Let me share some concrete examples of how Lusha can be applied:
Lead Generation for Sales Teams
: Use Lusha to build targeted lists based on job title and company size, then enrich them with verified contacts for cold outreach. One sales team I know increased their pipeline by 40% in a month.
Account-Based Marketing (ABM)
: Identify key decision-makers at target accounts and tailor campaigns using accurate data. The lookalike feature helps find similar companies to expand your reach.
Event Follow-Ups
: After conferences, upload attendee lists and use Lusha to enrich them with contact info, speeding up post-event follow-ups.
For more inspiration, check out
our collection of Lusha use cases
. These scenarios show how versatile the tool is across different business needs.
Tips for Maximizing Your Lusha Experience
To get the most out of Lusha, here are a few best practices I've picked up:
Combine with Your CRM
: Integrate Lusha with tools like Salesforce or HubSpot to automatically sync contact data. This keeps your database fresh and actionable.
Use Filters Wisely
: Don't just search broadly—apply filters for industry, revenue, and location to hone in on your ideal customers.
Leverage Buying Intent
: If you're on a plan with this feature, monitor intent topics to prioritize leads who are actively searching for solutions.
Regularly Update Credits
: Keep an eye on your credit usage and upgrade plans as needed to avoid interruptions.
For a comprehensive list, dive into
our Lusha tips and best practices
. These insights can help you work smarter, not harder.
Ready to Transform Your Outreach?

If you're tired of guessing contact details or dealing with outdated data, Lusha is the solution. It's trusted by thousands of teams worldwide for its reliability and innovation. I've seen firsthand how it streamlines prospecting and boosts results. Why not give it a shot?
Sign up for Lusha today
and take your B2B sales to new heights.
*Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links, which means I may earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you. I only recommend tools I genuinely believe in.*

children.text: Is Lusha free to use?
Yes, Lusha offers a permanent free plan with 40 credits per month, which includes verified emails and basic features. No credit card is required to start, making it easy to test the platform.
How accurate is Lusha's contact data?
Lusha prides itself on high accuracy by verifying emails and phone numbers in real-time from reliable sources. Users often report reduced bounce rates and more successful connections.
Can I integrate Lusha with my existing CRM?

Absolutely. Lusha integrates seamlessly with popular CRMs like Salesforce, HubSpot, and more through its API or native connections. This allows for automatic data enrichment and streamlined workflows.
